overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a covered timber-framed courtyard in a fantasy school setting, likely from a high-fidelity video game. Students in dark robes gather around wooden tables beneath heavy wooden beams, with sunlight streaming in from the open side facing a green hillside.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a covered timber courtyard bathed in natural sunlight. Students in wizard robes gather around wooden tables or walk through the space, while the open side reveals a green hillside beyond. The heavy wooden architecture and stone flooring create a medieval academic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a covered timber-framed courtyard that maintains a serene and scholarly atmosphere. It begins with a wide perspective of the medieval academic space, where natural sunlight bathes the heavy wooden beams and stone flooring. As the eye wanders through the scene, students in dark wizard robes are seen gathering around wooden tables or drifting through the courtyard. The view finally extends past the architecture to reveal a lush green hillside visible through the open side of the structure.
